debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero n
⊢ IsCyclic ↥(rootsOfUnity n Circle)

failed_attempts:
apply IsCyclic.of_surjective (rootsOfUnity.zpowersHom (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n).toFun)
    intro ζ
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := (IsPrimitiveRoot.zpowers_eq_rootsOfUnity (by apply_instance)).surj ζ
    exact ⟨k, by simp [hk, ← Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv_apply]⟩

apply IsCyclic.of_surjective (powersHom (rootsOfUnity n Circle) ⟨cexp ((2 * π / n :) * I),
      Submonoid.mem_unitSphere.mpr (norm_exp_ofReal_mul_I (2 * π / ↑n))⟩)
    intro ζ
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n).symm.surjective ζ
    use k
    simp [hk, Circle.coe_pow]

apply IsCyclic.of_surjective (restrictRootsOfUnity coeHom n)
    exact Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n .surjective
